## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX rebranding concepts developed by Noboringdesign team based on provided mood boards and brand insights.](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two concept directions presented: 1) Modernist-inspired with subtle logo refresh, 2) Bolder redesign with primary colors and data visualization focus](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Both concepts built on "Think Like Publishers" theme, balancing analog/digital elements](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Renato appreciated logo balance adjustment and flow elements; will share detailed video feedback after team review](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Next steps: Renato to provide Loom video feedback by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)

## Topics

### Concept 1: Modernist Refresh

  - [Subtle logo adjustment for better balance](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Quadratic grid layout inspired by Bauhaus design](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Updated "Futura" typography with monospaced variant](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Analog-style high-contrast B\&W photography with collage elements](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Iconography blending modernist and contemporary UI styles](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Color palette: Retained core blues, adjusted green to more analog tone](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Concept 2: Bold Reimagining

  - [More significant logo redesign with geometric typography and linear 'X' icon](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Primary color palette (yellow, red, blue) inspired by Bauhaus](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - ["Geom" display typeface for headlines, "Rethink" for body text](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Strong focus on data visualization and infographic elements](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [B\&W photography with gradient overlays for striking contrast](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Abstract iconography derived from 'X' logo module](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Brand Strategy Alignment

  - [Both concepts rooted in "Think Like Publishers" theme](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Aim to balance enterprise trust with modern edge](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Emphasis on clear, relevant, research-backed storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Visual metaphors for content as infrastructure, measurable growth](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Feedback and Preferences

  - [Renato appreciated the subtle logo adjustment in Concept 1](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Showed interest in the flow elements and color balance of Concept 2](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Preferred the lighter background version of Concept 2](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Suggested potentially animating the curved elements in the logo](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to create and share a Loom video with detailed feedback after internal team review](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Noboringdesign team to await feedback via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Follow-up questions or clarifications to be addressed through Slack](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Prepare for potential refinements based on upcoming feedback](https://fathom.video/share/czA5wsARyrBXFUsojd5Uz825PLHioZAB?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
